top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(
        ((last_driver_time - champion_time) * 100.0 / champion_time) 
        AS INTEGER
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM (
    SELECT 
        MIN(CASE WHEN r.position = 1 THEN r.milliseconds END) AS champion_time,
        MAX(CASE WHEN r.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')) THEN r.milliseconds END) AS last_driver_time
    FROM results r
    JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.ra...

SELECT 
    CAST(
        (last_driver.time - champion.time) * 100.0 / last_driver.time 
        AS REAL
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN results champion ON r.raceId = champion.raceId AND champion.position = 1
    JOIN results last_driver ON r.raceId = last_driver.raceId AND last_driver.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceId = r.raceId)
WHERE 
    r.year = 2008 
    AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    CAST(
        ((last_driver_time - champion_time) * 100.0 / champion_time) 
        AS INTEGER
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM (
    SELECT 
        MIN(CASE WHEN r.position = 1 THEN r.milliseconds END) AS champion_time,
        MAX(CASE WHEN r.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')) THEN r.milliseconds END) AS last_driver_time
    FROM results r
    JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.ra...

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        ((last_driver_time - champion_time) * 100.0 / champion_time),
        2
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT milliseconds FROM results r 
         JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId 
         WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
         AND r.position = '1' LIMIT 1) AS champion_time,
        (SELECT milliseconds FROM results r 
         JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId 
         WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name =...

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (CAST(last_driver.milliseconds AS REAL) - CAST(champion.milliseconds AS REAL)) 
        * 100.0 / CAST(last_driver.milliseconds AS REAL), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN results champion ON r.raceId = champion.raceId AND champion.position = 1
    JOIN results last_driver ON r.raceId = last_driver.raceId 
        AND last_driver.position = (
            SELECT MAX(position) 
            FROM results 
            WHERE raceId = r.raceId 
...
